name: Field Engineer
description: Tool belt, welding goggles, and a SCAMP turret strapped to their back. The Field Engineer digs in and holds ground — deploying automated fire support and self-repairing between attacks. Patient, tactical, dangerous.

abilities.name: Revolver Shot
abilities.description: A steady, well-aimed round. The engineer's sidearm has both physical and tech-enhanced ammunition modes.

abilities.name: Overcharge
abilities.description: Run maximum current through the weapon system. Deals massive damage in a single supercharged burst.

abilities.name: Field Repairs
abilities.description: A quick self-repair with the engineer's tool kit. Not elegant, but effective. Restores 22 HP.

abilities.name: Suppression Fire
abilities.description: Sustained fire loaded with toxic chemical rounds. Deals damage and leaves enemies poisoned.
